svg.title: Design: constitution (optional, first run) plus specify, plan and tasks with approvals
svg.desc: The assistant pulls the feature spec from Confluence, optionally builds the constitution on first run, then designs the feature by specifying, planning and breaking into tasks. Maker skills apply corporate guardrails, checker skills review the spec, the LLM drafts in a loop, and the developer approves the constitution, plan and tasks. Approved tasks are written to Jira as tickets.
svg.text: approved tasks become Jira tickets → continues in Implement and Test
